evals.prompt: A repository has approved discovery and requirements, but product and design stages are pending. Choose the next skill and mode.
evals.expected_output: Routes only to project-definition/product and names the evidence; it does not perform product work.
assertions: The answer names project-definition as the next skill.
The answer names product as the next mode.
The answer does not skip to architecture or coding.
The route is based on durable artifact status.

evals.prompt: An approved sprint exists, but a scope-change gate is open for one lane. Route the repository.
evals.expected_output: Routes to durable gate resolution before normal progression.
assertions: The answer does not dispatch or integrate the affected lane.
The gate artifact and authorized resolver are identified.

evals.prompt: A repository has approved project definition, architecture, and module contracts, but no state-of-union strategy has reconciled the open GitHub Issues against the north-star goal.
assertions: The answer names state-of-union as the next skill.
The answer names strategy-review as the next mode.
The answer does not create sprint lane contracts.
